<function=python>

# Check what changed after clicking the purple ring

# Check the purple ring region
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nPurple ring region (rows 17-25, cols 35-43):")
for r in range(17, 26):

print("\nWhite diamond region (rows 30-40, cols 4-12):")
for r in range(30, 41):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][4:13]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
